title: melancranis contorta
side_effects: Melancranis contorta can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. In rare cases, long-term use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Furthermore, excessive consumption of Melancranis contorta has been linked to kidney damage and an increased risk of liver disease in certain individuals. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Melancranis contorta for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of these side effects.
